introSection: Harpy is a steel flying roller coaster located at Xishuangbanna Sunac Land in Xishuangbanna, Yunnan, China. It opened with the park on 26 September 2015.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Yellow track with dull green supports.

fullText:
Harpy is a steel flying roller coaster located at Xishuangbanna Sunac Land in Xishuangbanna, Yunnan, China. It opened with the park on 26 September 2015.

Yellow track with dull green supports.
